scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m pip install -r python_service/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n python,backend,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"Set-Location 'python_service'; uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000\"" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.bootstrap: npm run setup && npm run dev
